conbody.p: This section describes the new features in the Juniper Cloud-Native Router (JCNR) 25.3 release.

section.title: New Features in Juniper Cloud-Native Router Release 25.3

li.p: Support for Static VXLAN with IPv4 and IPv6 Underlay—Juniper Cloud-Native Router supports static VXLAN to extend Layer 2 networks over a Layer 3 IP underlay through manually configured VXLAN tunnels, including support for Layer 2 circuit (L2CKT) with static VXLAN.

Support for Multi-tenancy in a single cSRX service-chained instance— For customers sharing the same 5G gateways, Juniper Cloud-Native Router supports a single cSRX service-chained instance, with dedicated trust and untrust interfaces and VRFs per tenant. The untrust interfaces and VRFs may be shared between customers, however the trust interfaces and VRFs must be dedicated per tenant.
